narrative:
Precinct Rock Creek Village (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 437 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
